title: When a pending item lost its executor, it should be rescheduled
issue_text:
Otherwise the task is lost forever.

@jglick noticed it in https://github.com/jenkinsci/jenkins/blob/fdb1dc9e7478c0cfe5d11e464ca7d53d8a6331f9/core/src/main/java/hudson/model/Queue.java#L1535 but the implementation has been wrong forever.

If a computer gets disconnected just at the same time a task gets assigned to one of its executor, https://github.com/jenkinsci/jenkins/blob/7f969d02171209187b144a29cc41c448a7c9442f/core/src/main/java/hudson/model/Executor.java#L367 appears in system logs, but the corresponding queue item gets lost and you can observe higher level symptoms such as
```
ERROR: node block appears to be neither running nor scheduled; will cancel if this condition persists
ERROR: node block still appears to be neither running nor scheduled; cancelling
```
in pipeline logs.
